headline: Is It Time To Reassess NRG Energy (NRG) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether NRG Energy's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article will help you test that against several valuation yardsticks. The stock closed at US$145.80, with returns of a 4.6% decline over 7 days, an 18.6% decline over 30 days, a 12.3% decline year to date, and a 46.6% gain over the past year, so recent moves have been quite different depending on your time frame. Recent coverage has focused on NRG Energy's position within the US utilities...
